channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics

item.title: Head Start funding lags by nearly $1 billion this year, causing some preschool closures
item.description: Head Start centers across the U.S. have received nearly $1 billion less in federal money compared with this time last year — and a lag in funding this week has caused some preschool classrooms for low-income children to close.
item.dc:creator: CHEYANNE MUMPHREY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Fox News Politics Newsletter: Boasberg V. Trump
item.description: Welcome to the Fox News Politics newsletter, with the latest updates on the Trump administration, Capitol Hill and more Fox News politics content.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Grassley, Johnson press DOJ IG to respond on whether ‘untasked’ undercover agents were present on Jan 6
item.description: EXCLUSIVE: Sens. Ron Johnson and Chuck Grassley are demanding information from the Justice Department’s inspector general on whether any unassigned, or "untasked," confidential human sources from DOJ agencies beyond the FBI were in or around the Capitol on Jan. 6, 2021.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Maryland senator to visit El Salvador to check on mistakenly deported man
item.description: Maryland Sen. Chris Van Hollen (D) said he is traveling to El Salvador on Wednesday to check on the status of a deported legal resident.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: NIL payments OK at UNLV, UNR, but payment amounts secret under SB293
item.description: A bill concerning NIL — name, image, likeness — and how UNLV and UNR can manage contracts directly with players passed on Tuesday in the Nevada Senate, advancing to the Assembly with other bills. A Republican leader objected to secrecy surrounding the payment amounts.
item.dc:creator: Greg Haas, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Biden alleges Trump has 'taken a hatchet' to Social Security in his first post-presidency speech
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — Former President Joe Biden warned on Tuesday that President Donald Trump has “taken a hatchet” to Social Security, weighing in on a critical issue for millions of Americans as the 82-year-old Democrat briefly returned to the national stage.
item.dc:creator: STEVE PEOPLES and FATIMA HUSSEIN, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Trump not expected to attend White House Correspondents' dinner
item.description: Trump did not attend any of the annual dinners during his first term, bucking a tradition that went back several administrations.
item.dc:creator: Dominick Mastrangelo, NewsNation

item.title: A whistleblower’s disclosure details how DOGE may have taken sensitive labor data
item.description: A whistleblower tells Congress and NPR that DOGE may have taken sensitive labor data and hid its tracks. “None of that information should ever leave the agency,” said a former NLRB official.
item.dc:creator: Jenna McLaughlin, MPR News

item.title: Big law spends top dollar as Trump takes aim at firms
item.description: A series of new agreements brokered between President Trump and major law firms suggests a new price tag for those looking to dodge executive orders targeting the legal profession.
item.dc:creator: Rebecca Beitsch, NewsNation

item.title: In Pelican Rapids, teens learn the skill of civil discourse
item.description: In a deeply polarized country, a new program in Minnesota is teaching middle and high schoolers how to find common ground in their communities. Program leaders say it’s an effort to inspire young people to become engaged politically and in their towns.
item.dc:creator: Catharine Richert, MPR News

item.title: Trump administration freezes $2.2 billion in grants to Harvard over campus activism
item.description: BOSTON (AP) — The federal government says it’s freezing more than $2.2 billion in grants and $60 million in contracts to Harvard University, after the institution said it would defy the Trump administration’s demands to limit activism on campus.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL CASEY, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Trump floats deporting 'homegrown criminals' to El Salvador
item.description: Trump has suggested shipping off U.S. citizens who commit violent crimes to places like El Salvador's notorious mega-prison CECOT.
item.dc:creator: Kellie Meyer, NewsNation

item.title: 281 bills fall victim to deadline at Nevada Legislature. Here are the highlights
item.description: A total of 281 bills missed a Friday deadline to win committee passage in Carson City, the first major deadline at the Nevada Legislature this session. If that seems like a lot, consider that 875 bills are still alive.
item.dc:creator: Greg Haas, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Pritzker says he's undecided about testifying before Congressional panel
item.description: The US House Committee on Oversight and Government Reform requested testimony from Pritzker, other Democrats about sanctuary laws.
item.dc:creator: BJ Lutz, WGN 9

item.title: Former President Joe Biden to speak in Chicago on Tuesday in effort to rally support for Social Security
item.description: Former President Joe Biden is scheduled to speak at the national conference of Advocates, Counselors and Representatives for the Disabled.
item.dc:creator: BJ Lutz, WGN 9

item.title: Minnesota Senate Minority Leader Johnson is optimistic lawmakers will make session deadline
item.description: State lawmakers have a big hill to climb with just over a month before the Legislative session is over. Despite economic uncertainty, Senate Minority Leader Mark Johnson, R-East Grand Forks, said he’s optimistic they’ll get a budget passed before the deadline.
item.dc:creator: Cathy Wurzer, Lukas Levin, and Gracie Stockton, MPR News

item.title: White House doctor says Trump is 'fully fit' in medical report
item.description: President Trump lost 20 pounds, lowered “bad” cholesterol and has “diverticulosis and a benign polyp,” according to a medical report released by the White House.
item.dc:creator: Luke Garrett, MPR News

item.title: Florida education bill sparks debate over funds for advanced placement programs
item.description: Florida lawmakers battled it out on the House floor this week over a bill that could lead to significant funding cuts to education.
item.dc:creator: Mackenzie LaPorte, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Tariffs could impact Tampa Bay shoppers, businesses by summer, economist says
item.description: TAMPA, Fla. (WFLA) — Cheri Hudson owns clothing store Imagine That!!! in South Tampa. It has been her business for 25 years. She is a supporter of President Trump’s trade policies. “I trust Donald Trump. It's only going to be a matter of time. The tariffs are fair.
item.dc:creator: Ty Russell, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Trump eyes major cuts to NOAA research
item.description: The Trump administration is eyeing cuts to climate, weather and ocean research in a draft budget blueprint for the National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration (NOAA).
item.dc:creator: Rachel Frazin, Fox 5

item.title: Trump announces $600 million in new deals with five law firms
item.description: The deals bring to nine the number of firms that have struck agreements with Trump in the wake of numerous actions targeting major law offices.
item.dc:creator: Rebecca Beitsch, Fox 5

item.title: Trump threatens to put higher tariff rate back if countries don’t strike deals
item.description: President Trump on Thursday threatened to reverse course on a 90-day pause on country-specific tariffs if countries don’t strike a deal with his administration before then.
item.dc:creator: Alex Gangitano, Fox 5

item.title: Trump reverses Biden rule restricting water usage for showerheads and other home appliances
item.description: President Donald Trump has long complained about modern rules that limit water flow for showerheads, making it harder for him to wash his "beautiful hair.
item.dc:creator: Matthew Daly, WFLA, NBC
